name: world-intelligence-dashboard
description: Global news aggregation & intelligence dashboard on Cloudflare Workers

scripts.db:migrate:local: wrangler d1 execute wid-db --local --file=./migrations/0001_initial.sql && wrangler d1 execute wid-db --local --file=./migrations/0003_cron_runs.sql && wrangler d1 execute wid-db --local --file=./migrations/0004_batch_pipeline.sql && wrangler d1 execute wid-db --local --file=./migrations/0005_source_errors.sql && wrangler d1 execute wid-db --local --file=./migrations/0006_article_entities.sql
scripts.db:migrate:remote: wrangler d1 execute wid-db --remote --file=./migrations/0001_initial.sql && wrangler d1 execute wid-db --remote --file=./migrations/0003_cron_runs.sql && wrangler d1 execute wid-db --remote --file=./migrations/0004_batch_pipeline.sql && wrangler d1 execute wid-db --remote --file=./migrations/0005_source_errors.sql && wrangler d1 execute wid-db --remote --file=./migrations/0006_article_entities.sql
